channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Oil And Gas
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location: Kuwait
Description:

A Roustabout position is available for work in Kuwait within the Oil & Gas sector. The role involves supporting general rig operations, including lifting, rigging, housekeeping, and equipment maintenance to ensure safe and efficient drilling activities. Responsibilities include assisting drilling crews, maintaining rig cleanliness, handling loads, and supporting various operational tasks.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Roustabout Job in Kuwait - Oil Gas Sector at Vacancies Onshore Offshore

item.description:
Location: Vietnam
Description:

Multiple positions are available for upcoming Oil & Gas Drilling projects located in Vietnam. Roles include onshore, drilling, and marine functions. Specific positions range from Master/Captain and OIM to various engineering, deck, and support staff. Interested candidates should refer to the application link for full details and requirements.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Oil Gas Drilling Project Jobs in Vietnam at Jobs info

item.description:
Location: Saudi Arabia
Description:

A Welding Inspector with a B.Tech/Diploma in Engineering and minimum 8 years of experience, including 3-4 years as a QC Welding Inspector in Oil & Gas construction projects, is required. Candidates must hold CSWIP 3.1 qualification and possess expertise in welding inspection, quality control, and international standards. Previous Saudi Aramco experience is preferred. Responsibilities include conducting inspections before, during, and after welding activities, verifying procedures, and ensuring compliance with standards like ASME and API.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Welding Inspector Job - Oil Gas Construction at Monarch Jais

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Welding Inspector with B.Tech/Diploma in Engineering and over 8 years of industry experience, including 3-4 years as a QC Welding Inspector in Oil & Gas construction projects, is sought. Candidates must hold CSWIP 3.1 certification and possess expertise in welding inspection, quality control, and compliance with international standards like ASME and API. Previous Saudi Aramco experience is preferred.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Welding Inspector Job - Oil Gas Construction at monarchjais.com

item.description:
Location: remote locations
Description:

Multiple positions are available on a 2000 HP Land Rig for Oil & Gas careers. Roles include Rig Leadership (Drilling Superintendent, Toolpusher), Drilling Crew (Driller, Derrickman, Roughneck), Technical Specialists (Mud Engineer, Directional Driller), and Maintenance Crew (Mechanic, Electrician). Applicants require relevant drilling rig experience, strong HSE commitment, and the ability to work rotational shifts in remote locations.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Drilling Rig Jobs - Oil &amp; Gas Careers at SEA Updates

item.description:
Location: Multiple Locations
Description:

Experienced professionals are sought for various offshore and onshore Oil & Gas projects globally. Positions include Able Seaman, Steward, Motorman, Cook, Welder, 3rd Electrician, Driller, Assistant Driller, Derrickman, Roughnecks, Roustabout, Mechanical Technician, Electronic Technician, Directional Driller, Mechanic, Toolpusher, Rig Mechanic, and Night Toolpusher. Opportunities are available in China, Nigeria, North Sea, Oman, UAE, and Saudi Arabia.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Gas Job Opportunities at SEA Updates

item.description:
Location: Saudi Arabia
Description:

Qualified Chief Engineers, Second Engineers, Third Engineers, ETOs, and Crane Operators are sought for a SPJUB vessel operating on an Aramco project. Minimum experience requirements vary by position, with specific COC and certificate needs. Joining is upon provisional approval and KSA visa issuance. Salary is to be discussed. All documents must be valid for 12 months, and applicants should not hold a valid Saudi Iqama visa.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Officers Crane Operator Jobs on SPJUB Vessel at Aavishka

item.description:
Location: Kirkuk, Iraq
Description:

An Oil & Gas company is seeking a Field Specialist with 3-8 years of experience in Wireline Operations, specifically for land rig operations and wellsite services. Candidates should possess a Diploma or Bachelor's Degree in Engineering and a strong understanding of wireline equipment. The position is based in Kirkuk, Iraq.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Field Specialist Job - Oil Gas Offshore at NES Fircroft

item.description:
Location: Saudi Arabia, UAE, Canada, and offshore locations
Description:

Opportunities are available in the oil and gas sector for skilled and semi-skilled workers in 2026, with many roles offering visa sponsorship and high salaries. Positions such as Roustabout, Floorhand, Welder, Heavy Equipment Operator, Scaffolder, and Pipeline Laborer are in demand. These jobs often involve rotational work schedules, typically 28 days on and 28 days off, and are located in remote or high-risk environments, necessitating competitive compensation packages including accommodation, feeding, and travel allowances.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Jobs With Visa Sponsorship at linkedin

item.description:
Location: Qatar
Description:

Multiple positions are available for an oil and gas company in Qatar, including Welder, Rigger, Deck Crew, Technician, and Crane Operator roles. Benefits include free food, accommodation, medical, and transportation, with 8-hour duty plus overtime. This is a CV selection process for immediate hiring.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Oil Gas Jobs in Qatar - Multiple Positions at QATAR OIL & GAS COMPANY
